_comment: Copy to <project>/.claude/frugal-sensitivity.json to enable the sensitivity gate. With no such file the gate is off. Each rule blocks an Agent delegation when its content matches; the gate fails CLOSED (a broken config blocks delegation). patterns are Python regexes matched against all string fields of the spawn; paths are fnmatch globs tested against whitespace-separated tokens (note: * matches / too, so secrets/* covers nested paths); allow_agents lists worker types still permitted to receive the matched data (empty = block every worker, handle inline).

rules.name: pii-nl-iban
rules._comment: Dutch IBAN shape. Do not delegate participant financial data.

rules.name: secrets-and-keys
rules._comment: API keys, tokens, private key material by path or content.
